alkylation concentration: alkylated for 45 min at room temperature with 20 mM IAA that in darkness
cleavage agent: for trypsin digestion, the protein samples were diluted by adding 100 mM NH4CO3
collision energy: using normalized collisional energy (NCE) setting as 30
enrichment method: using tryptic digestion, antibody affinity enrichment, and nanoscale liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectroscopy (nano-LC-MS/MS)
instrument: analyzed by Q ExactiveTM Plus hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
labeling: we performed global acetylation and succinylation proteome analysis
reduction reagent: 1% Triton-100, 65 mM DTT and 1% Protease Inhibitor Cocktail
reduction concentration: 1% Triton-100, 65 mM DTT and 1% Protease Inhibitor Cocktail
